name: ClauseGuard
description: Automatically detects and classifies privacy & security risks in Terms of Service and Privacy Policy documents.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src https://clauseguard-production-183f.up.railway.app; img-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'
